# MDE 1.3.8

## Features

- Added app-level internationalization with built-in English and Chinese language packs.
- First launch now uses the system language when no MDE language preference has been saved.
- Added a Preference panel in Settings for switching the app language.
- Added custom app language-pack generation through detected Claude Code or Codex AI CLI tools.
- Localized workspace management, explorer actions, editor actions, AI actions, update dialogs, flowchart controls, placeholders, status messages, aria labels, and user-facing errors through the app language packs.

## Bug Fixes

- Stabilized Electron E2E launches by forcing the test harness to start from a known English language preference, while still covering runtime language switching.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updated `AGENTS.md` so future production UI text must be added through language packs instead of hard-coded strings.
- Moved the completed i18n requirement document into `docs/requirements/done/`.
- Added unit coverage for language preference resolution, custom language-pack persistence, language-pack key completeness, and formatted text interpolation.
- Added integration coverage for AI IPC language-pack generation.
- Added E2E coverage for Preference language switching and persistence after reload.
- Could not inspect optional GitHub Actions signing/notarization secrets because repository secret values are not exposed through the current environment. The release remains compatible with the existing unsigned macOS DMG/ZIP path and Windows NSIS updater artifacts.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "switches the app language"`
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "shows the initial centered workspace popup|opens a workspace and expands the docs folder|switches the app language"`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon DMG and ZIP
- macOS Intel DMG and ZIP
- Windows x64 NSIS installer
